brief_justification: Arrives at correct answer (C) but via arithmetic error (855×0.98 computed as 838.9 instead of 837.9), making the final selection approximate rather than exact; Goes one level beyond surface by tracking defective and good units separately through each stage including proportional waste application; Agent explicitly notices the discrepancy and attempts to recheck, showing active self-monitoring mid-analysis; Attempts re-verification by considering rounding/floor-ceiling explanations but does not re-derive the arithmetic to find the actual error; Acknowledges the numerical discrepancy and hedges with 'closest and intended answer' rather than claiming certainty; Only considers one alternative (integer rounding) to explain the discrepancy rather than re-examining the multiplication; Step-by-step work is shown for all stages with explicit numbers at each step, though the arithmetic error in Stage 3 is unresolved; Avoids the frictionless-throughput anti-pattern by accounting for all three reduction mechanisms (defect rate, waste, inspection), but does not explicitly call out the anti-pattern; Does not exhibit resistance blindness or frictionless assumption—all throughput reductions are enumerated and applied; Follows a sequential stage-by-stage reduction path consistent with the topology's cumulative-resistance formula structure, but does not show explicit branching gates or threshold checks.
